spec.rawSql:
SELECT time, title, text FROM (
  SELECT min(timestamp) AS time, concat(agent_name, ' -> ', agent_version) AS title, 'agent version' AS text
  FROM agent_usage WHERE agent_name != '' AND agent_version != '' GROUP BY agent_name, agent_version
  UNION ALL
  SELECT min(timestamp) AS time, concat(skill_name, ' -> ', skill_version) AS title, 'skill version' AS text
  FROM agent_usage WHERE skill_name != '' AND skill_version != '' GROUP BY skill_name, skill_version
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens over time (input vs output)
spec.description: Input/output token volume over time across all users/agents currently selected by the dashboard variables (narrow to a specific user via the user_id filter if needed - no need for a permanent per-user split here).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum(u.input_tokens) AS input,
  sum(u.output_tokens) AS output
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost over time (input vs output)
spec.description: input_cost already bundles cache-read/cache-write pricing (LiteLLM prices those tiers within the input side) - there is deliberately no separate cache-cost series, see the agent_usage table comment in clickhouse/schema.sql explaining why a manual cache price table was removed after it overcounted cost.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum(u.input_cost) AS input,
  sum(u.output_cost) AS output
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by agent/version over time
spec.description: Input/output tokens over time per agent name+version (main-session calls bucketed as 'main agent'). Lets a new agent version be compared against its predecessor's token footprint.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', if(u.agent_version = '', u.agent_name, concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version))) AS metric,
    sum(u.input_tokens) AS in_val,
    sum(u.output_tokens) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate by agent/skill/model over time
spec.description: Share of calls with cache_hit=1 over time, by agent/skill/model - shows whether prompt caching is actually landing for a given agent, skill, or model, and whether that's improving or regressing.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    concat(multiIf(agent_name != '', 'subagent', skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', model) AS metric,
    sum(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read,
    sum(input_tokens) AS input_tok
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT time, metric, cache_read / nullIf(cache_read + input_tok, 0) AS value
FROM filtered
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Spend by user
spec.description: Total spend (USD) per user over the selected time range - a single ranked bar per user, for a quick 'who is spending the most' snapshot without a time axis.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC

spec.title: Top 10 users by tokens
spec.description: The 10 users with the highest total token usage in the selected time range, ranked bar - the token counterpart to 'Spend by user'.

spec.rawSql:
WITH session_durations_period AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
session_durations_all AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
user_duration_period AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_period GROUP BY user_id
),
user_duration_all AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_all GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  sum(u.input_tokens) AS tokens_in,
  sum(u.output_tokens) AS tokens_out,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS total_tokens,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  any(udp.duration_s) AS session_duration_period_s,
  any(uda.duration_s) AS session_duration_all_s
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN user_duration_period udp ON udp.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN user_duration_all uda ON uda.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Active users & sessions
spec.description: 7-day rolling average of daily active users/sessions, bucketed by calendar day regardless of the Window variable, over whatever time range/filters are currently selected.

spec.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
    uniqExact(user_id) AS users_day,
    uniqExact(session_id) AS sessions_day
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
  GROUP BY time
)
SELECT
  time,
  avg(sessions_day) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sessions,
  avg(users_day) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS users
FROM daily
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Error rate by tool
spec.description: Share of calls ending in status=failure, grouped by tool_name, over the selected time range - flags which tools are least reliable right now.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(status = 'success') AS successes,
  countIf(status = 'failure') AS failures,
  countIf(status = 'failure') / nullIf(countIf(status = 'success') + countIf(status = 'failure'), 0) AS error_rate
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY error_rate DESC

spec.title: Latency percentiles (p50/p95) by tool_name
spec.description: p50/p95 of agent_events.latency_ms (full call duration, endTime-startTime) grouped by tool_name - flags which tools are slow. Distinct from ttft_ms, which measures only time-to-first-token.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  tool_name,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND status = 'success'
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC

spec.title: MCP tool calls
spec.description: Call volume per MCP tool (mcp__... names) over the selected time range - shows which MCP integrations are actually being exercised.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(status = 'success') AS calls,
  countIf(status = 'failure') AS failures,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY calls DESC

SELECT

WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND status = 'success'

  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))

spec.title: Error rate trend by tool
spec.description: Same metric as 'Error rate by tool_name' but as a trend over time instead of a single aggregate, so a reliability regression on one tool can be spotted as it happens.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  tool_name AS metric,
  countIf(status = 'failure') / nullIf(countIf(status IN ('success', 'failure')), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))

spec.title: Full trace of selected session(s) - click the magnifier on prompt/response/raw_payload to see full text
spec.description: Requires an explicit, partial session selection - returns nothing when 0 or literally all available sessions are selected, since either means "no real filter" and would otherwise pull every raw_payload in the table.

spec.rawSql:
WITH selected_session_count AS (
  SELECT count() AS n FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([${session_id:singlequote}]) AS s) WHERE s != ''
),
available_session_count AS (
  SELECT countDistinct(session_id) AS n FROM agent_events WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
)
SELECT
  ev.user_id,
  ev.session_id,
  ev.turn_id,
  ev.timestamp,
  ev.event_type,
  ev.tool_name,
  substring(JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls', 1, 'function', 'arguments'), 1, 300) AS tool_detail,
  ev.agent_name,
  ev.agent_version,
  ev.skill_name,
  ev.skill_version,
  ev.status,
  ev.latency_ms,
  m.prompt_text,
  m.response_text,
  ev.raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = ev.session_id AND m.timestamp = ev.timestamp
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name)))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name))
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.turn_id ASC

spec.title: Call stack for selected session(s)
spec.description: Requires an explicit, partial session selection - returns nothing when 0 or literally all available sessions are selected, since either means "no real filter" and would otherwise pull every call across every session at once.

spec.rawSql:
WITH selected_session_count AS (
  SELECT count() AS n FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([${session_id:singlequote}]) AS s) WHERE s != ''
),
available_session_count AS (
  SELECT countDistinct(session_id) AS n FROM agent_events WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
),
usage_by_call AS (
  SELECT u.session_id, u.timestamp,
    sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tok,
    sum(u.cost) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
    AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
    AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
  GROUP BY u.session_id, u.timestamp
)
SELECT
  ev.timestamp AS time,
  ev.session_id AS session_id,
  concat(
    if(ev.agent_name != '', concat('[', ev.agent_name, if(ev.agent_version != '', concat(' v', ev.agent_version), ''), '] '), ''),
    if(ev.command_name != '', concat('/', ev.command_name, ' '), ''),
    if(ev.skill_name != '', concat('(', ev.skill_name, if(ev.skill_version != '', concat(' v', ev.skill_version), ''), ') '), ''),
    if(ev.tool_name = '', 'reply', concat(
      ev.tool_name,
      ' `', substring(replaceRegexpAll(JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls', 1, 'function', 'arguments'), '\\s+', ' '), 1, 70), '`'
    )),
    if(ev.status = 'failure', ' [FAIL]', ''),
    if(ev.latency_ms IS NOT NULL, concat(' - ', toString(ev.latency_ms), 'ms'), ''),
    if(u.tok > 0, concat(' - ', toString(u.tok), ' tok - $', toString(round(u.cost, 4))), '')
  ) AS call,
  ev.raw_payload AS raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN usage_by_call u ON u.session_id = ev.session_id AND u.timestamp = ev.timestamp
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name)))
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.timestamp

spec.title: Top 10 most expensive sessions
spec.description: The 10 sessions with the highest total cost in the selected time range - a quick way to find outlier sessions worth inspecting in the Sessions & Debugging tab.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.user_id,
  any(ev.started_at) AS started_at,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  any(ev.duration_s) AS duration_s
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, min(timestamp) AS started_at, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  GROUP BY session_id
) ev ON u.session_id = ev.session_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Top 10 most expensive prompts by tokens
spec.description: The 10 individual prompts (from agent_messages) with the highest input+output token count - complements 'Top 10 most expensive sessions' at the level of a single turn instead of a whole session.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.user_id,
  m.prompt_text,
  argMax(m.response_text, u.timestamp) AS response_text,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = u.session_id AND m.timestamp = u.timestamp
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.user_id, m.prompt_text
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Agent version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)
spec.description: Empty until an agent/skill actually has 2+ distinct versions observed in agent_usage - by design, this shows nothing for a brand-new agent/skill on its first version. Not a query bug.

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)) AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE agent_name != ''
  GROUP BY agent_name, agent_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(agent_version) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.agent_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.agent_name

spec.title: Tokens by user
spec.description: Token totals per user over the selected time range/filters, bucketed by the Window variable.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by scope per week
spec.description: Weekly token totals split by scope (agent/skill/main session) instead of by user - shows whether growth in usage is coming from agents, skills, or plain main-session conversation.

spec.rawSql:

  concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,

  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))

  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by command over time
spec.description: Input/output tokens over time per slash command (command_name) - shows which commands are the heaviest token consumers and whether that's changing.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    command_name AS metric,
    sum(input_tokens) AS in_val,
    sum(output_tokens) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND command_name != ''
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost by command over time
spec.description: Spend (USD) over time per slash command - the cost counterpart to 'Tokens by command over time'.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    u.command_name AS metric,
    sum(u.input_cost) AS in_val,
    sum(u.output_cost) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.command_name != ''
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Failed tool calls
spec.description: Tool executions that returned an error (tool_result is_error=true), not LLM-API-level failures (those never carry a tool_name - see agent_events.status). Recovered from "messages" at ingest time only, so this has no historical backfill - only shows failures from calls ingested after this panel was added.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  user_id,
  session_id,
  failed_tool_name AS tool_name,
  failed_tool_args AS arguments,
  failed_tool_error AS error
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND failed_tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(failed_tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], failed_tool_name)))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.title: Tokens per call by agent/version (bloat detector)
spec.description: Goal: catch a prompt/tool-set regression that makes an agent version 'heavier' per call even if total volume looks flat. How it works: averages input+output tokens per litellm_call, bucketed by day, per agent name+version - a rising line for the same agent means each individual call is getting more expensive, not just more frequent.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', if(u.agent_version = '', u.agent_name, concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version))) AS metric,
  avg(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens per call by skill/version (bloat detector)
spec.description: Goal: same regression-detector as 'Tokens per call by agent/version', but for skills, since a skill's own instructions/examples can grow independently of the agent that invokes it. How it works: averages input+output tokens per litellm_call, bucketed by day, per skill name+version.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(u.skill_version = '', u.skill_name, concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)) AS metric,
  avg(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND u.skill_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Prompt/response length by agent & skill (verbosity trend)
spec.description: Goal: an early-warning signal for token bloat - text length grows before it shows up as a token-count regression, and it's readable without knowing model-specific tokenization. How it works: averages character length of agent_messages.prompt_text/response_text per day, grouped by skill (or agent when no skill applies).

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    if(skill_name = '', if(agent_name = '', 'main agent', agent_name), skill_name) AS metric,
    length(prompt_text) AS prompt_len,
    length(response_text) AS response_len
  FROM agent_messages
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' prompt chars') AS metric, avg(prompt_len) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
  UNION ALL
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' response chars') AS metric, avg(response_len) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache efficiency ratio by agent/skill
spec.description: Goal: distinguish 'caching happened at all' (existing cache-hit-rate panel) from 'how much of the prompt was actually served from cache', which is what determines the dollar savings. How it works: cache_read_tokens / input_tokens (input_tokens already includes cache_read + cache_creation), per day, per agent (or skill when no agent applies).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(u.agent_name = '', if(u.skill_name = '', 'main agent', u.skill_name), u.agent_name) AS metric,
  sum(u.cache_read_tokens) / nullIf(sum(u.input_tokens), 0) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache savings, $ (saved_cache_cost)
spec.description: Goal: show prompt-caching payoff in the unit that actually matters - dollars, not tokens - since cache read/write tiers are priced differently and a token ratio alone doesn't say whether caching is worth it. How it works: sums LiteLLM's own saved_cache_cost field (extracted from agent_events.raw_payload, not a stored column) per day, per agent (or skill).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(agent_name = '', if(skill_name = '', 'main agent', skill_name), agent_name) AS metric,
  sum(JSONExtractFloat(raw_payload, 'saved_cache_cost')) AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: TTFT (time to first token) p50/p95 by model
spec.description: Goal: track model responsiveness (how long before the model starts streaming) separately from total call duration, which 'Latency percentiles by tool_name' already covers. How it works: p50/p95 of agent_usage.ttft_ms (completionStartTime - startTime), bucketed by day, per model.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT u.timestamp AS time, u.model AS metric, u.ttft_ms AS ttft_ms
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp) AND u.ttft_ms > 0
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' p50') AS metric, quantile(0.5)(ttft_ms) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
  UNION ALL
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' p95') AS metric, quantile(0.95)(ttft_ms) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Stop-reason mix over time
spec.description: Goal: catch two failure modes that a plain error-rate panel misses because the call still counts as 'success' - answers getting cut off (max_tokens) or refused (refusal) instead of ending in a clean tool_calls/stop. How it works: stacked count of agent_usage.stop_reason per day.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  u.stop_reason AS metric,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp) AND u.stop_reason != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Retry / self-correction rate by agent & skill
spec.description: Goal: a direct quality signal for a skill/prompt - how often the model has to react to its own failed tool call, versus succeeding cleanly the first time. How it works: share of agent_events rows where failed_tool_name != '' (this call is responding to a tool_result marked is_error), per day, per agent (or skill).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(agent_name = '', if(skill_name = '', 'main agent', skill_name), agent_name) AS metric,
  countIf(failed_tool_name != '') / nullIf(count(), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: API-level failure reasons over time
spec.description: Goal: tell platform-level failures (rate limits, overload, auth) apart from tool-execution failures, which 'Failed tool calls'/'Error rate by tool_name' already cover - those never carry a tool_name since the call failed before any tool ran. How it works: stacked count of agent_events rows with status='failure', grouped by error_str.error.type extracted from raw_payload, per day.

spec.rawSql:
WITH failures AS (
  SELECT timestamp, raw_payload
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND status = 'failure'
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'error_str', 'error', 'type') = '', 'unknown', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'error_str', 'error', 'type')) AS metric,
  count() AS value
FROM failures
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Top repeating tool errors
spec.description: Goal: 'Failed tool calls' lists individual failures - this instead groups them, so a single misbehaving tool call pattern (bad args, flaky dependency) shows up as one row with a count instead of 20 identical-looking entries. How it works: groups agent_events by failed_tool_name + the first 80 characters of failed_tool_error, ranked by occurrence count.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  failed_tool_name AS tool_name,
  substring(failed_tool_error, 1, 80) AS error_excerpt,
  count() AS occurrences,
  max(timestamp) AS last_seen
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND failed_tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(failed_tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], failed_tool_name)))
GROUP BY tool_name, error_excerpt
ORDER BY occurrences DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.title: Command adoption
spec.description: Goal: see which slash commands actually got adopted versus shipped-but-unused, which the existing token/cost-by-command trend panels don't answer directly. How it works: one row per command_name with call count, distinct session count, and first/last-seen timestamps, ranked by call count.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  command_name,
  count() AS calls,
  count(distinct session_id) AS sessions,
  min(timestamp) AS first_seen,
  max(timestamp) AS last_seen
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND command_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY command_name
ORDER BY calls DESC

spec.title: Subagent spawns over time by type
spec.description: Goal: catch an orchestrator/prompt change that starts spawning more (or fewer) subagents than before - a fan-out regression that token/cost panels only show indirectly. How it works: counts agent_invocations rows (one per Agent tool_use recovered from the orchestrator's own messages) per day, per subagent_type, joined to agent_events on session_id so the existing user/agent/skill/command filters still apply.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(ai.spawned_at, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  replaceRegexpOne(ai.subagent_type, '_(v[0-9][0-9.]*)$', ' \\1') AS metric,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_invocations ai
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT session_id, user_id
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
) ev ON ev.session_id = ai.session_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ai.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ai.spawned_at)
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ai.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Session cost distribution
spec.description: Goal: 'Top 10 most expensive sessions' shows the outlier tail - this shows the overall shape, so it's possible to tell 'most sessions are cheap with a couple of expensive outliers' apart from 'costs are broadly high across the board'. How it works: histogram of total cost per session_id (agent_usage.cost summed per session) over the selected time range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT session_id, sum(cost) AS total_cost
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY session_id

SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_branch, ''), '(none - no branch captured)') AS git_branch,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY git_branch
ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT

spec.title: Cost by subagent type over time
spec.description: Goal: see which subagent types (script-ops, clickhouse-analyst, etc) actually drive spend. How it works: joins agent_usage.agent_invocation_id to agent_invocations.agent_id (the subagent-id -> subagent_type lookup) - this is the same join key already used elsewhere in the schema but not previously wired into any panel, so this cost was invisible before.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  ai.subagent_type AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = u.agent_invocation_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND u.agent_invocation_id != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by subagent type over time
spec.description: Same join as 'Cost by subagent type' - total input+output tokens per subagent_type over time.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT

FROM agent_usage u
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = u.agent_invocation_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND u.agent_invocation_id != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))

spec.title: Top subagent types by cost
spec.description: Ranked totals for the selected time range - which subagent type is worth optimizing first.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  ai.subagent_type AS subagent_type,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens,

FROM agent_usage u
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = u.agent_invocation_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND u.agent_invocation_id != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))

spec.title: Subagent call outcome by type (success/failure)
spec.description: Goal: spot a subagent type whose calls fail disproportionately. status comes from agent_events, joined to agent_invocations the same way as the cost/token panels above.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(e.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  concat(ai.subagent_type, ' - ', e.status) AS metric,
