FROM agent_events e
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = e.agent_invocation_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = e.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(e.timestamp)
  AND e.agent_invocation_id != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], e.user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], e.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], e.command_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache creation tokens by TTL (1h vs 5m)
spec.description: Goal: see how much prompt-cache writing goes to the cheaper-but-longer-lived 1h tier vs the 5m tier that expires between widely-spaced requests. A rising 5m share usually means requests are landing far enough apart that the longer cache window isn't being reused.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    'ephemeral 1h' AS metric,
    sum(u.cache_creation_1h_tokens) AS value
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
    FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
  ) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  GROUP BY time
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    'ephemeral 5m' AS metric,
    sum(u.cache_creation_5m_tokens) AS value
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
    FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
  ) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  GROUP BY time
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate over time (overall)
spec.description: cache_read_tokens / input_tokens (input_tokens already includes cache_read + cache_creation), aggregated across all agents/skills/models currently selected - the project-wide version of the per-agent/skill/model breakdown in 'Cache hit rate by agent/skill/model over time'.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum(u.cache_read_tokens) / nullIf(sum(u.input_tokens), 0) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache tokens over time (read vs creation)
spec.description: Volume behind the hit-rate ratio above: cache_read_tokens (served from cache) vs cache_creation_tokens (written to cache), aggregated across everything currently selected.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum(u.cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read,
  sum(u.cache_creation_tokens) AS cache_creation
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id

spec.title: /goal invocations over time
spec.description: Count of litellm calls made under the 'goal' slash command, bucketed by the Window variable. One /goal invocation spans many calls (one whole session), so this tracks call volume, not invocation count - see the table below for one row per invocation.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE command_name = 'goal'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: /goal usage log
spec.description: One row per /goal invocation (= one session, since turn_id is currently always 0): who ran it, which session, how many LLM calls it took, total wall-clock duration, and the first prompt text of that session. Click the magnifier on 'prompt' to see the full text.

spec.rawSql:
WITH goal_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    min(timestamp) AS started_at,
    max(timestamp) AS last_call_at,
    count() AS calls,
    any(user_id) AS session_user_id
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
  WHERE command_name = 'goal'
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  GROUP BY session_id
),
prompts AS (
  SELECT session_id, argMin(prompt_text, timestamp) AS prompt_text
  FROM agent_messages
  WHERE command_name = 'goal'
  GROUP BY session_id
)
SELECT
  gs.started_at AS timestamp,
  gs.session_user_id AS user,
  gs.session_id AS session,
  gs.calls AS "llm calls",
  round(dateDiff('second', gs.started_at, gs.last_call_at) / 60.0, 2) AS "duration (min)",
  p.prompt_text AS prompt
FROM goal_sessions gs
LEFT JOIN prompts p ON p.session_id = gs.session_id
ORDER BY gs.started_at DESC

  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, ''))) AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)) AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)) AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)) AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))))) AS "Sessions",
  toString((SELECT count(DISTINCT session_id, prompt_text) FROM agent_messages LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)) AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, ''))) AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)) AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)) AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)))) AS "Prompts",
  toString((SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FROM agent_events LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)) AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, ''))) AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)) AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)) AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)) AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))))) AS "Users"

spec.description: Controls how timeseries data is grouped/aggregated over time (e.g. 1m = per minute); does not affect the selected time range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT agent_name AS __value, agent_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE agent_name != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT skill_name AS __value, skill_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE skill_name != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT command_name AS __value, command_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE command_name != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT
  tool_name AS __value,
  replaceOne(tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS __text
FROM agent_events
WHERE startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT model AS __value, model AS __text FROM agent_usage WHERE model != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT user_id AS __value, user_id AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE user_id NOT IN ('', 'unknown-user')
ORDER BY __value

spec.name: session_id
spec.label: Session

spec.rawSql:
SELECT __value, __text FROM (
  SELECT
    session_id AS __value,
    concat(any(user_id), ' - ', session_id) AS __text,
    max(timestamp) AS __ts
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  GROUP BY session_id
  ORDER BY __ts DESC
  LIMIT 200
)
